Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Yan Shoumei]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 3''' — Yan Shoumei uses Blood Shadow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 3''' — Yan Shoumei wears deep red sacred artist's robes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 15''' — Yan Shoumei is a woman with hair like a veil and uses Blood Shadow.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 11''' — Yan Shoumei is a Redmoon Truegold in Ghostwater.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 10''' — Yan Shoumei is the leader of the Redmoon Hall team.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 18''' — Yan Shoumei is of Redmoon Hall and a chosen of Reigan Shen.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 4''' — Yan Shoumei is a character that Eithan could potentially defeat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 6''' — Yan Shoumei is a ghostly girl that Lindon faced in Ghostwater.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 6''' — Yan Shoumei's spirit was growing disordered.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 6''' — Yan Shoumei suffered grievous wounds during her match.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 6''' — Lindon was looking for information on Yan Shoumei in the records.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — Yan Shoumei is a competitor in the Uncrowned.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — Yan Shoumei was a disciple of the Blood Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — Yan Shoumei is from Redmoon Hall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 11''' — Yan Shoumei is a fighter in the tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 11''' — Yan Shoumei is a member of Redmoon Hall with black hair and one visible eye.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 11''' — Yan Shoumei wears sacred arts robes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 11''' — Yan Shoumei is a character who interacts with Yerin and Calan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 11''' — Yan Shoumei is a Dreadgod cultist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 15''' — Yan Shoumei uses blood madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 15''' — Yan Shoumei uses Striker techniques.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 17''' — Yan Shoumei is an Uncrowned in Calan Archer's faction.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 19''' — Yan Shoumei is mentioned in relation to a master.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 21''' — Yan Shoumei is a fighter Yerin must face.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 21''' — Shoumei is a character who Forged a Red Crystal for protection.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 21''' — Shoumei's technique involves a collection of blood techniques intended to synergize with a Shadow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 21''' — Yan Shoumei is the full name of Shoumei.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 21''' — Yan Shoumei is the chosen of Reigan Shen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 21''' — Yan Shoumei possesses the Ancient Scale, a Divine Treasure.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 21''' — Yan Shoumei possesses an Archlord weapon in her soulspace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 21''' — Yan Shoumei has an Iron body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 22''' — Yan Shoumei is a Redmoon artist who uses Striker techniques.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 22''' — Yan Shoumei was gathering sword aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Yan Shoumei competed against Sophara.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Yan Shoumei gathered blood madra in her palms.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Yan Shoumei is the Uncrowned of Redmoon Hall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — Yan Shoumei's Blood Shadow provides a sense of more-than-physical strength.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 9''' — Yan Shoumei has an enhanced Shadow named Crusher.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — Yan Shoumei is a Truegold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — Yan Shoumei's Blood Shadow is developing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — Yan Shoumei was abandoned on a dock as a baby.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — Yan Shoumei was raised by six fishermen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — Yan Shoumei uses the Red Crystal technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — Yan Shoumei has an Iron body and an Ancient Scale.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — Yan Shoumei was trained by the Akura clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — Yan Shoumei is a Redmoon artist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — Yan Shoumei uses blood madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — Yan Shoumei can unleash her Blood Shadow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — Yan Shoumei is an Uncrowned.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — Yan Shoumei is the Overlady of Sailfin Port.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — Yan Shoumei is an Overlady.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — Yan Shoumei possesses a Silverscale Iron body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — Yan Shoumei possesses an Ancient Scale received from Seshethkunaaz.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — Yan Shoumei uses the weapon Midnight Rain.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — Yan Shoumei uses a bow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — Yan Shoumei uses the Midnight Rain technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — Yan Shoumei has a Blood Shadow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — Yan Shoumei has an Iron body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — Yan Shoumei was an Uncrowned.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — Yan Shoumei is a member of Redmoon Hall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — Yan Shoumei is of Redmoon Hall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — Yan Shoumei summons Midnight Rain.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
